Title: DROP SCHEMA
Description: Remove a database schema, potentially including all its dependent objects

Note : You cannot drop a schema if it contains objects (e.g. tables, views, functions or procedures, except comments).
Use option CASCADE to specify to also drop those referencing objects. The default behavior is RESTRICT.
System schemas (sys, tmp, profiler, json) can not be dropped as they are needed by the system.
See also: CREATE SCHEMA , CURRENT_SCHEMA , SET SCHEMA .
Associated system table: sys.schemas or information_schema.schemata .
Examples:
DROP SCHEMA [ IF EXISTS ]
schema_name
[ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]
